basic_details.job_title: AAI Recruitment 2026 Notification Out for 389 Manager & Junior Executive Posts, Apply Online Starts August 8
basic_details.selection_process_brief: Computer Based Test → Application Verification → Interview (Post Codes 1–11)
basic_details.short_information: AAI Recruitment 2026 OUT! The Airports Authority of India (AAI) has released the AAI Manager and Junior Executive Recruitment 2026 notification for 389 vacancies across 15 disciplines. The recruitment includes posts of Manager and Junior Executive in departments such as Engineering, Finance, IT, Law, Operations, Commercial, Fire Services, and other disciplines. Eligible candidates with the required educational qualifications and experience can apply online through aai.aero.

important_dates.tentative date of computer based test: Will be announced on AAI website (www.aai.aero)

application_fee.details: Application Fee: Rs. 1,000 (inclusive of GST), payable through online mode only. SC candidates, ST candidates, PwBD candidates, Women candidates, and AAI Apprentices who have completed 1 year of Apprenticeship Training in AAI are exempt from the fee. Fee can be paid via Debit Card, Credit Card, Internet Banking, IMPS, or Cash Cards/Mobile Wallets. Fees once paid are non-refundable under any circumstances; duplicate payments will be refunded after the closing date. Candidates can apply for multiple posts with separate registration and separate fee payment for each post.

age_limit.details: SC/ST candidates: 5 years OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) candidates: 3 years PwBD candidates with permanent disability (in identified suitable categories): 10 years Ex-servicemen and Commissioned Officers with at least 5 years of military service: 5 years Candidates in regular AAI service who have completed probation: up to 10 years

qualification.details: Eligibility is discipline-specific, covering educational qualification and, for Manager posts, post-qualification work experience. Junior Executive posts require no prior work experience (Nil), while Manager posts generally require 3 years of relevant post-qualification experience.

vacancy_details.Educational Qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Engineering/Technology in Civil
Bachelor's Degree in Engineering/Technology in Electrical

vacancy_details.Minimum Work Experience: 3 years in Finance & Accounts, with ERP (e.g., SAP) experience

vacancy_details.Educational Qualification: Full-time Bachelor's Degree in Engineering/Technology in Computer Science/Computer Engineering/IT/Electronics, OR full-time MCA
vacancy_details.Minimum Work Experience: 3 years in Database Management/Data Centre Operations/ERP Management/Data Analytics/Software Development/Web Development (Team Lead level)

vacancy_details.Educational Qualification: Full-time Bachelor's Degree in Architecture, registered with the Council of Architecture
Professional Degree in Law (3-year regular course after graduation or 5-year integrated course after 10+2); eligible for Bar Council of India enrolment
Full-time Bachelor's Degree in Engineering/Technology in Fire Engineering/Mechanical Engineering/Automobile Engineering
Graduate in Science with full-time regular 2-year MBA, OR full-time Bachelor's Degree in Engineering
vacancy_details.Minimum Work Experience: 3 years in Airport Operations (Airside Operations/Terminal Management/Airline Operations/Ground Handling)

vacancy_details.Educational Qualification: Graduate with full-time regular 2-year MBA (Marketing specialization), OR full-time Bachelor's Degree in Engineering
vacancy_details.Minimum Work Experience: 3 years in Marketing/Sales/Business Development/Real Estate Leasing/Contracts & Procurement

vacancy_details.Educational Qualification: Post Graduate in Mathematical Statistics/Operation Research/Statistics/Applied Statistics/Economics with Statistics/Mathematics with Statistics from a UGC-recognized university
Full-time Bachelor's Degree in Mass Communication/Journalism/Literature (Hindi/English) with a Post Graduate Degree or 2-year full-time Diploma in Journalism/Mass Media/Mass Communication
vacancy_details.Minimum Work Experience: 3 years in Corporate Communication/Public Relations (content creation, media planning, branding, event management, etc.)

vacancy_details.Educational Qualification: Professional Degree in Law (3-year regular course after graduation or 5-year integrated course after 10+2); eligible for Bar Council of India enrolment
Graduate in Science with full-time regular 2-year MBA, OR full-time Bachelor's Degree in Engineering
Bachelor's Degree in Engineering/Technology in Civil, OR Master's in Science in Geography, OR Master's in Remote Sensing & GIS, OR Master's in Geo-informatics, OR Master's in Geomatics

salary_details.details: In addition to Basic Pay, Dearness Allowance, Perks (35% of Basic Pay), HRA, and other benefits including CPF, Gratuity, Social Security Schemes, and Medical benefits are admissible as per AAI Rules. Pay protection is provided as per DPE Guidelines for candidates joining from other CPSEs/State PSUs/Government Departments through proper channel.

selection_process: Computer Based Test (Objective Type) will be conducted for all posts

with no negative marking for wrong answers. Provisionally eligible candidates will be called for the Computer Based Test based on details furnished in the application form. The Computer Based Test will be followed by Application Verification/Subsequent Tests for all posts. Post Codes 1 to 11 (all Manager posts) will also include an Interview as part of the selection process. For Manager (Fire Services)
Application Verification is followed by a Physical Measurement Test
and Ladder Climbing & Descending). Only candidates who qualify these tests proceed to the interview. For Manager and Junior Executive (Airport Operations)

a valid Light Motor Vehicle License is essential (temporary/learning license not accepted). Final selection is based on a merit list from Computer Based Test and Interview scores (wherever applicable)

subject to meeting all eligibility criteria. Selected candidates for Manager (Fire Services) must undergo training and execute a Surety Bond of Rs. 5 lakh to serve AAI for 3 years after training completion. Colour blindness and/or night blindness is a rejection criterion for all posts except Post Codes 3 (Finance) and 12 (Junior Executive Finance). Selected candidates will be liable to be posted anywhere in India.
how_to_apply: Visit the official website: www.aai.aero and go to the "CAREERS" tab.
Keep ready a valid personal email ID, mobile number, scanned photograph, signature, left thumb impression, and hand-written declaration as per specifications.
Fill in the online application form with accurate personal, educational, and experience details.
Upload all required documents as per the eligibility criteria for the post.
Pay the application fee of Rs. 1,000 online (if applicable), using the integrated payment gateway.
Verify all details carefully before final submission, as no changes are possible after submitting.
Take a printout of the e-Receipt and the online application form containing fee details, for your own record (no need to send it to AAI).
Regularly check your registered email (including spam folder) and the AAI website for admit card and further updates.
important_instructions: Only Indian Nationals fulfilling the eligibility criteria can apply. Age, qualification, experience, and all other eligibility criteria will be reckoned as on 07 September 2026 (cut-off date). Candidates should apply only if the final result of their required qualification has already been declared; there is no relaxation on this account. OBC (NCL), EWS, SC/ST, and Disability certificates must be valid and in the prescribed Government of India format, produced at the time of Application Verification/Interview. Candidates can apply for multiple posts, with separate registration and fee payment for each post. Furnishing wrong or false information will lead to disqualification, and AAI will not be responsible for any consequence of such information. No TA/DA will be paid for appearing in the Computer Based Test. The Computer Based Test will be bilingual (Hindi and English), except for the language test itself. AAI reserves the right to modify, alter, restrict, enlarge, or cancel the recruitment process at any time without prior notice. Court of jurisdiction for any dispute will be at Delhi.

Candidates with an engineering background can also explore more PSU Engineering Jobs and Manager Recruitment in PSUs. Those with an MBA or finance qualification may check other MBA Government Jobs and Finance Manager Vacancies. Candidates interested in aviation-sector careers can also browse more Airport Authority Jobs and Aviation Sector Recruitment for other current openings.

content_sections.heading: AAI Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details (Post Code-Wise)
content_sections.text: A total of 389 vacancies are available across 11 Manager disciplines and 4 Junior Executive disciplines. Total Vacancies: 389 Note: The number of vacancies is tentative and may increase or decrease at the sole discretion of AAI. PwBD (Persons with Benchmark Disability) vacancies are included within the above totals; some posts also carry unfilled PwBD backlog vacancies from previous recruitment cycles, as indicated in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: AAI Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Eligibility is discipline-specific, covering educational qualification and, for Manager posts, post-qualification work experience. Junior Executive posts require no prior work experience (Nil), while Manager posts generally require 3 years of relevant post-qualification experience.

content_sections.heading: AAI Recruitment 2026 Educational Qualification & Experience (Post-Wise)
content_sections.text: Candidates with a "Bachelor's Degree in Technology" may apply against the qualification "Bachelor's Degree in Engineering" for Commercial and Operations posts. Work experience must be from Central/State Government, PSUs, or Large Private Sector Organizations (listed companies, organizations with 250+ employees, or companies with annual turnover above Rs. 250 crores; large law firms must have turnover above Rs. 10 crores). Degrees/Diplomas acquired via Open and Distance mode from UGC-recognized universities or AICTE-approved courses are considered valid, wherever applicable.

rows.minimum_work_experience: 3 years in Database Management/Data Centre Operations/ERP Management/Data Analytics/Software Development/Web Development (Team Lead level)

content_sections.heading: AAI Recruitment 2026 Age Limit
content_sections.text: SC/ST candidates: 5 years OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) candidates: 3 years PwBD candidates with permanent disability (in identified suitable categories): 10 years Ex-servicemen and Commissioned Officers with at least 5 years of military service: 5 years Candidates in regular AAI service who have completed probation: up to 10 years

content_sections.heading: AAI Recruitment 2026 Salary Structure
content_sections.text: In addition to Basic Pay, Dearness Allowance, Perks (35% of Basic Pay), HRA, and other benefits including CPF, Gratuity, Social Security Schemes, and Medical benefits are admissible as per AAI Rules. Pay protection is provided as per DPE Guidelines for candidates joining from other CPSEs/State PSUs/Government Departments through proper channel.

content_sections.heading: AAI Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: Application Fee: Rs. 1,000 (inclusive of GST), payable through online mode only. SC candidates, ST candidates, PwBD candidates, Women candidates, and AAI Apprentices who have completed 1 year of Apprenticeship Training in AAI are exempt from the fee. Fee can be paid via Debit Card, Credit Card, Internet Banking, IMPS, or Cash Cards/Mobile Wallets. Fees once paid are non-refundable under any circumstances; duplicate payments will be refunded after the closing date. Candidates can apply for multiple posts with separate registration and separate fee payment for each post.

content_sections.heading: AAI Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Computer Based Test (Objective Type) will be conducted for all posts, with no negative marking for wrong answers. Provisionally eligible candidates will be called for the Computer Based Test based on details furnished in the application form. The Computer Based Test will be followed by Application Verification/Subsequent Tests for all posts. Post Codes 1 to 11 (all Manager posts) will also include an Interview as part of the selection process. For Manager (Fire Services), Application Verification is followed by a Physical Measurement Test, Driving Test, and Physical Endurance Test (Running, Casualty Carrying, Pole Climbing, Rope Climbing, and Ladder Climbing & Descending). Only candidates who qualify these tests proceed to the interview. For Manager and Junior Executive (Airport Operations), a valid Light Motor Vehicle License is essential (temporary/learning license not accepted). Final selection is based on a merit list from Computer Based Test and Interview scores (wherever applicable), subject to meeting all eligibility criteria. Selected candidates for Manager (Fire Services) must undergo training and execute a Surety Bond of Rs. 5 lakh to serve AAI for 3 years after training completion. Colour blindness and/or night blindness is a rejection criterion for all posts except Post Codes 3 (Finance) and 12 (Junior Executive Finance). Selected candidates will be liable to be posted anywhere in India.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for AAI Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Scanned photograph, signature, left thumb impression, and hand-written declaration (as per prescribed specifications) Educational qualification certificates and mark sheets Caste Certificate [SC/ST/OBC(NCL)], valid for FY 2026-27, where applicable EWS Certificate, valid for FY 2026-27, where applicable Disability Certificate (generated through Swavalamban/UDID portal) for PwBD candidates Discharge Certificate for Ex-servicemen candidates Experience Certificate and supporting documents proving the nature and duration of work experience Apprentice Certificate from AAI, where applicable No Objection Certificate (NOC) from current employer, for candidates already working in Central/State Government, Autonomous Body, or PSU

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for AAI Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Visit the official website: www.aai.aero and go to the "CAREERS" tab. Keep ready a valid personal email ID, mobile number, scanned photograph, signature, left thumb impression, and hand-written declaration as per specifications. Fill in the online application form with accurate personal, educational, and experience details. Upload all required documents as per the eligibility criteria for the post. Pay the application fee of Rs. 1,000 online (if applicable), using the integrated payment gateway. Verify all details carefully before final submission, as no changes are possible after submitting. Take a printout of the e-Receipt and the online application form containing fee details, for your own record (no need to send it to AAI). Regularly check your registered email (including spam folder) and the AAI website for admit card and further updates.

content_sections.heading: AAI Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Only Indian Nationals fulfilling the eligibility criteria can apply. Age, qualification, experience, and all other eligibility criteria will be reckoned as on 07 September 2026 (cut-off date). Candidates should apply only if the final result of their required qualification has already been declared; there is no relaxation on this account. OBC (NCL), EWS, SC/ST, and Disability certificates must be valid and in the prescribed Government of India format, produced at the time of Application Verification/Interview. Candidates can apply for multiple posts, with separate registration and fee payment for each post. Furnishing wrong or false information will lead to disqualification, and AAI will not be responsible for any consequence of such information. No TA/DA will be paid for appearing in the Computer Based Test. The Computer Based Test will be bilingual (Hindi and English), except for the language test itself. AAI reserves the right to modify, alter, restrict, enlarge, or cancel the recruitment process at any time without prior notice. Court of jurisdiction for any dispute will be at Delhi. Candidates with an engineering background can also explore more PSU Engineering Jobs and Manager Recruitment in PSUs. Those with an MBA or finance qualification may check other MBA Government Jobs and Finance Manager Vacancies. Candidates interested in aviation-sector careers can also browse more Airport Authority Jobs and Aviation Sector Recruitment for other current openings.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in AAI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 389 vacancies in total, across 11 Manager disciplines and 4 Junior Executive disciplines.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for AAI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window closes on 07 September 2026. Applications opened on 08 August 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for AAI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age is 32 years for Manager posts and 27 years for Junior Executive posts, as on 07 September 2026, with category-wise relaxations applicable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary of an AAI Manager?
faq.answer: Manager posts (E-3 level) carry a pay scale of Rs. 60,000–1,80,000 (IDA), with an approximate CTC of Rs. 21 lakh per annum.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for AAI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 1,000 (inclusive of GST). SC, ST, PwBD, Women candidates, and AAI Apprentices with 1 year of completed apprenticeship are exempt from the fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for AAI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection involves a Computer Based Test, followed by Application Verification/Subsequent Tests, and an Interview for Manager posts (Post Codes 1–11). Manager (Fire Services) also includes Physical Measurement, Driving, and Physical Endurance Tests.

faq.question: Q7. Is prior work experience required for AAI Junior Executive posts?
faq.answer: No. Junior Executive posts require Nil work experience, while Manager posts generally require 3 years of relevant post-qualification experience.

faq.question: Q8. Where will selected AAI candidates be posted?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be liable to be posted anywhere in India, at AAI's discretion.
